news.headline: BoJ's Governor Ueda: When there's huge uncertainty, you usually want to proceed cautiously and gradually.
BoJ's Governor Ueda: It's still taking time for us to get to 2% inflation in a sustainable manner.
Bach to Rock Music School opening new location in Severna Park, MD. Open House on Nov. 17, first school in Baltimore Metro Area.
news.summary: Bach to Rock has recently launched its inaugural school in the Baltimore Metro Area, specifically in Severna Park, MD. The location is conveniently positioned between Baltimore and Annapolis. The opening date was on October 23, 2024. Bach to Rock is known as America's inclusive music school catering to students of various age groups. This expansion marks a significant step for the institution as it establishes its presence in a new region.

news.headline: Air Force Services Center debuts "BASE BITES" Episode 2 at U.S. Space Force Base Vandenberg; exclusive on AFLive app.
news.summary: Joint Base San Antonio, Lackland, Texas - On October 23, 2024, the Air Force Services Center (AFSVC) unveiled the launch of the second installment of their series, produced exclusively for the AFLive app and available for streaming at www.AFLive.TV. The announcement marks an exciting development for the organization as they aim to reach a wider audience through digital platforms.

news.headline: Luxury car buyers in Scottsdale, Arizona can enjoy special Halloween offers on new Mercedes-Benz vehicles at Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, customers exploring car options can benefit from unique Halloween deals on new Mercedes-Benz vehicles at Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale. The dealership in Scottsdale disclosed on October 23, 2024, that they are introducing special Halloween offers on a limited selection of Mercedes-Benz vehicles.

news.headline: Frontier Credit Union introduces IDgo service for secure authentication. PORTLAND, Oct. 23, 2024 - IDgo launched by credit union in Idaho Falls.
news.summary: Frontier Credit Union members in Idaho Falls, Idaho now have access to the enhanced security and convenience of using IDgo for authentication. The service was launched by IDgo on October 23, 2024, in collaboration with Frontier Credit Union. This partnership aims to provide a more secure and simplified authentication process for members. Through the integration of IDgo, members can enjoy a seamless and secure experience.

news.headline: Sphero® introduces Blueprint Engineering™ kits merging mechanical, electrical components, aiding engineers; Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in GREENVILLE, Texas, called Sphero, Inc., is introducing groundbreaking building kits on Oct. 23, 2024. These kits integrate mechanical and electrical components for hands-on learning to tackle practical engineering obstacles. Sphero, Inc., known for its programmable robots and STEM education tools, is proud to unveil this innovative product.

news.headline: Crofter's Organic introduces first national brand organic fruit spread in pouch format. Leading innovation in the category.
news.summary: Crofter's Organic, a top player in the organic fruit spread industry, has made a groundbreaking move by being the initial national brand to introduce organic fruit spread in pouch format. This development occurred on October 23, 2024 in Parry Sound, ON. Crofter's Organic, renowned for its jams, jellies, and preserves, is leading the way with this innovation. They hold the title of the largest producer in this sector.

news.headline: Monalee partners with Signature Solar to launch Artemis, the fastest customer-first platform in the solar industry.
news.summary: Signature Solar, a prominent distributor and retailer in the solar industry, has recently secured exclusive early access to Artemis, a cutting-edge platform developed by Monalee. The platform has quickly gained recognition for being the fastest customer-oriented solution in the home solar sector. This news was announced in Boston on October 23, 2024. Artemis by Monalee is revolutionizing the industry with its agile approach, marking a significant shift in operational practices.

news.headline: SAVAS Capital Marketplace launches an alternative investment platform for Korean financial institutions, connecting them with US fund managers. NYC, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: SAVAS Capital Marketplace, a group of investment experts, helps Korean institutional investors find successful U.S. fund managers and secondary sales options. The company, known for its cross-border investment solutions, is based in New York. On October 23, 2024, SAVAS made an announcement through PRNewswire-PRWeb about their latest achievements.

news.headline: Maestro Media's tabletop RPG, The Smurfs: Roleplaying Game, 100% funded on Kickstarter in just 18 minutes. Los Angeles, Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based company Maestro Media has introduced a new tabletop RPG titled The Smurfs: Roleplaying Game in collaboration with The Smurfs franchise. The game was launched on Kickstarter on October 23, 2024, and has successfully reached its funding goal. This marks Maestro Media's second project with The Smurfs, and it has garnered significant anticipation from fans.

news.headline: Tech expert Tatyana Mamut discusses AI disruption and human-centered design on podcast with Karla Jo Helms.
news.summary: Renowned tech innovation and disruption expert Tatyana Mamut is set to appear on the Disruption Interruption podcast with host Karla Jo Helms. Mamut, known for her unique career path from an engineer family background, will delve into the blend of technology, culture, and humanity. This promises to be a riveting discussion on the podcast, which has attracted a significant following, with an average of 10,000 listeners per episode. The upcoming episode featuring Mamut is expected to bring in even more listeners, potentially reaching a wider audience of tech enthusiasts and those interested in societal impacts of technological advancements.

news.headline: Eduventures report shows adult learners' interest rising in non-degree credentials, hybrid learning.
news.summary: Recent research has uncovered a growing interest in non-degree credentials, a preference for hybrid learning, and indications of higher adult learner demand. The study, conducted in Boston on October 23, 2024, showed a significant rise in non-degree credential pursuits. The data also highlighted a shift towards hybrid learning models. Additionally, there were signs of increased demand from adult learners for educational opportunities. The findings were released by Encoura®, a prominent educational technology and research entity.

news.headline: HACE launches $100,000 campaign to support students and leaders with scholarships and leadership opportunities.
news.summary: HACE is committed to developing the next wave of leaders with the launch of the "Juntos AVANZAMOS: Elevating Scholarships and Leadership" campaign. The ambitious target is set at $100,000 to fund essential scholarships and support future leaders.

news.headline: GF Building Flow Solutions Americas has launched new Uponor ServicePEX™ pipe with PEX-a technology for water service applications, providing flexible, durable, and efficient clean water delivery in construction.
news.summary: GF Building Flow Solutions Americas recently unveiled the innovative Uponor ServicePEX™ pipe, incorporating cutting-edge PEX-a technology specifically designed for water service applications. This new pipe provides a flexible, durable, and efficient solution ideal for ensuring clean and safe water delivery in both new construction projects and service line replacements. The Uponor ServicePEX™ pipe is poised to revolutionize water service systems with its advanced features and benefits, making it a standout choice for builders and contractors.

news.headline: USIM partners with FreeWheel's Strata tech to enhance digital media planning. Streamlines workflows for exceptional results. Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: Strata's latest digital application has been successfully implemented to enhance efficiency and productivity for USIM, based in Irvine, California. This collaboration has led to a significant reduction in redundancies and a streamlining of workflows. USIM's team can now provide exceptional results for clients more effectively. This development was announced on October 23, 2024. Additionally, USIM has broadened its partnership with FreeWheel, a leading global entity, to further enhance their services.

news.headline: Lingk introduces Data Agent Product Family, revolutionizing data integration with AI-powered agents.
news.summary: Leading provider of enterprise integration platform and managed services for Higher Education and businesses, Lingk, has unveiled its innovative Data Agent Product Family. This suite includes AI-powered agents set to automate and enhance data processes, marking a significant advancement for the company.

news.headline: Gilbane finishes Slate Upper School project in North Haven, Conn, following completion of Slate Lower School in 2018.
news.summary: In NORTH HAVEN, Conn., on Oct. 23, 2024, the Upper School, an extension of the previously completed Slate Lower School by Gilbane in 2018, was inaugurated. State and Local authorities, along with members of the Slate School community and professionals from Patriquin Architects and Gilbane Building Company, came together for the event. The new facility represents a significant expansion for the Slate School, with the original school being completed just six years prior. This development showcases the commitment to education and growth within the community, with construction costs for the Upper School estimated to be in the range of several million dollars.

news.headline: Super Star Car Wash in Phoenix introduces "Super Shine" express wash, donating 50% to Big Brothers Big Sisters.
news.summary: Throughout the community, Super Star Car Wash, based in the Valley, will be carrying out their yearly initiative to give back by providing a unique "Super Shine" express wash at all of their greater Phoenix establishments until October 25, 2024. With this offer, 50% of the proceeds from each wash will be donated to Big Brothers Big Sisters of Central Arizona.

news.headline: UrVenue and UrResort are now on Oracle Cloud Marketplace to enhance guest experiences, streamline operations. Las Vegas, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: UrVenue and its companion platform UrResort have recently become part of the Oracle PartnerNetwork to enhance operational efficiency and customize guest experiences through integrations available on the Oracle Cloud Marketplace. This development was announced in Las Vegas on October 23, 2024. UrVenue and UrResort are prominent in the hospitality industry and aim to streamline operations and offer tailored guest journeys through this collaboration.

news.headline: Hurricane Helene relief: PrideStaff raises funds for Asheville office hit by the storm via GoFundMe.
news.summary: PrideStaff, a nationally franchised staffing organization, has initiated a GoFundMe campaign in light of the destruction caused by Hurricane Helene. Their aim is to aid their Asheville, North Carolina office in recovery efforts. The campaign was launched on October 23, 2024, and is based in FRESNO, California. The initiative seeks to garner support for rebuilding operations following the disastrous impact of the hurricane.

Gather AI partners with Bosma Enterprises, empowering visually impaired staff in warehouse Role, offers varied services.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, during National Disability Employment Awareness Month, Gather AI, an inventory intelligence solution, reveals the addition of a new client, Bosma Enterprises. Bosma, the biggest employer of individuals with blindness or visual impairment in Indiana, provides various business services such as warehousing, contract packaging, light manufacturing, and product assembly. Alongside these offerings, Bosma extends rehabilitation services, job training, and employment programs to aid those with vision challenges.

UPS aims to end revenue misses with Q3 earnings: Revenue estimated at $22.14B, EPS at $1.63. UPS had 8 straight misses.
news.summary: UPS is set to announce its third-quarter financial results, with analysts expecting revenue of $22.14 billion, up from $21.06 billion from the same period last year. The company has missed revenue estimates for the past eight quarters after previously beating estimates for 10 consecutive quarters. Analysts predict earnings per share of $1.63, an increase from last year's $1.57. UPS has beaten earnings estimates in seven of the last 10 quarters. The company will be observed closely to compare its performance with competitors, including FedEx. UPS has had fluctuations in meeting analyst expectations, with some quarters exceeding estimates, while others falling short.

Flashpoint to participate at 2024 DoDIIS Worldwide Conf. in Omaha, NE with over 750 customers worldwide.
news.summary: A press release from Flashpoint revealed that the company will be present at the 2024 Department of Defense Intelligence Information System (DoDIIS) Worldwide Conference in Washington. Flashpoint, known for its expertise in threat data and intelligence, will have their Vice President for National Security Solutions, Rick Fisher, and Executive Director Gray Loftin in attendance. As the industry's largest private provider of threat intelligence, Flashpoint boasts over 750 current customers.

news.headline: ADS opens largest stormwater engineering center in Hilliard, Ohio. Lt. Gov. Jon Husted marks the event, Oct. 23, 2024. ($WMS)
news.summary: In a recent event in Hilliard, Ohio, Lt. Governor Jon Husted participated alongside state and local government representatives, as well as economic development officials, to commemorate the grand opening of the world's largest stormwater engineering center. This center is established by Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS), known as ADS. The event took place on October 23, 2024. ADS is a prominent company in the field of stormwater engineering and the new center symbolizes a significant advancement in this sector.
